name: MAG-7 | 反梗精英
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted with a hydrographic in a geometric motif. Hey Sabri, you should take this one... it's loud like you - Carmen Cocinero, Extraction Expert
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器使用几何学图案的花纹进行了涂装。 嘿，萨布里，你应该拿上这玩意儿…… 它和你一样吵 - 营救专家卡门.库西内罗
